# Instructions:

**before starting you will create a map in your brain of the context of codebase from \.CODEBASE_CONTEXT_GRAPH.md**

1. If a dotnet project "C:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\18\Community\MSBuild\Current\Bin\MSBuild.exe" to test builds. but alway ask the user to do the UAT.
2. Dont't do a build/run check before starting a job. only at the end.
3. Don't create walkthrough markdowns.
4. Be extremely concise and selective about writing comments into code files.
5. at the conclusion of a job, git commit changes to main with a 1 line message.
6. don't branch off main unless told to.
